title: Write an professional email, client has requested to supply DC operated ATS motor while in contract we have quoted for A…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Write an professional email, client has requested to supply DC operated ATS motor while in contract we have quoted for AC operated ATS motor. DC operated ATS is hardly available therfore we can not supply. Also the price of DC operated motor is higher. We request you to kindly supply the ATS motor and we install.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Subject: Request to supply AC operated ATS motor as per contract

Dear [Client’s Name],

Greetings!

We hope this email finds you well. We are writing to address your recent request to supply a DC operated ATS motor as per our contract agreement. Unfortunately, we regret to inform you that the DC operated ATS motor is currently not available in the market. Moreover, the price of the DC operated motor is higher compared to the AC operated motor which we quoted for in the contract.

We understand that your project requires an ATS motor, and we would like to help you in the most efficient way possible. Therefore, we kindly request you to accept the AC operated ATS motor that we had initially quoted for since it is readily available in the market. Additionally, we can assure you that this motor is of high-quality and will perform just as effectively as the DC operated motor would. 

We will be more than happy to install the ATS motor for you as per the agreed-upon terms in our contract. We strive to deliver exceptional service and products to our clients, and it is our priority to ensure that you receive satisfactory results.

Should you have any further queries, please do not hesitate to contact us. We look forward to hearing from you soon.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Best regards,

[Your Name] 

[Company Name]

Subject: Request to supply ATS motor for installation

Dear [Client’s Name],

Greetings!

It has come to our attention that there has been some confusion regarding the supply of the ATS motor for your project. We understand that you require an ATS motor and we would be more than happy to install it for you as per the agreed-upon terms in our contract.

However, we would like to inform you that as a supplier, it is not within our scope to provide or supply the ATS motor for your project. We kindly request that you please provide us with the ATS motor that you wish to install in accordance with our contract.

We assure you that we will install the motor to the highest standard and as per the agreed-upon timeline. Our team of experienced professionals strives to deliver quality work and exceptional service to our clients, and we guarantee you that we will not disappoint.

We would appreciate your understanding of this matter, and we are more than happy to assist you with any queries or concerns that you may have. Please feel free to contact us if you require any further clarification.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

[Company Name]

Therefore it wont be possible for us to supply the ATS Motor and we request you if you can get it better price from your suppliers then please you supply us and we install it

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Subject: Revised quotation for the ATS motor

Dear [Client’s Name],

Greetings!

We would like to thank you for choosing our company for your project. We understand that we had quoted the price for an AC operated ATS motor in our contract, and we have been working diligently to secure the motor for you. However, we regret to inform you that the price of the AC operated motor has increased significantly in recent times, and it is not viable for us to supply it to you at the same price we had initially quoted.

We apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused you, and we hope that you understand our position. In light of this, we kindly request you to consider sourcing the ATS motor from your suppliers, who may be able to provide it to you at a better price than we can. We would be more than happy to install the motor for you in accordance with the agreed-upon terms in our contract.

We assure you that our team of experienced professionals will install the motor with utmost care and precision to ensure that it operates efficiently for your project. Furthermore, we will work closely with you to ensure that the installation process is seamless and meets your expectations.

Should you have any queries or concerns regarding this matter, please feel free to contact us. We will be more than happy to assist you in any way possible.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

[Company Name]

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Subject: Revised quotation for the ATS motor

Dear [Client’s Name],

Greetings!

We would like to inform you about the current market conditions and the revision in the price for the ATS motor that we had initially quoted in our contract. The price of the AC operated ATS motor has increased significantly, making it difficult for us to supply it to you at the same price that we had initially quoted. We apologize for any inconvenience that this may have caused you.

Furthermore, we would like to inform you that in addition to the price of the AC operated motor increasing, the price of the DC operated ATS motor is also much higher than the AC operated motor, as it is a highly specialized and rare product in the market. Therefore, as a result, it is not possible for us to supply the DC operated ATS motor to you.

In light of these circumstances, we kindly request you to consider sourcing the ATS motor from your suppliers, who may be able to provide you with the motor at a better price than we currently can. We will be more than happy to assist you with the installation of the motor, as per the agreed-upon terms in our contract.

We assure you that our team of experienced professionals will install the motor with the utmost care and precision to ensure that it operates efficiently for your project. Furthermore, we will work closely with you to ensure that the installation process is seamless and meets your expectations.

Should you have any queries or concerns regarding this matter, please feel free to contact us. We will be more than happy to assist you in any way possible.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

[Company Name]

turns.text: Write a professional email regarding the negotiation meeting for the generator preventive maintenance which was conducted yesterday. clients budget is 18,000,000 that we can not match. We have to decline their offer politely. Also write the reason why we can't match their budget price as cost of spares, high quality service, associated cost, high raw materials cost which is causing higher cost of spares. However we would like  to consider 5% disocount form our intitall quoted offer

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Subject: Outcome of the negotiation meeting for the generator preventive maintenance

Dear [Client’s Name],

I would like to take this opportunity to extend my gratitude for attending the negotiation meeting for the generator preventive maintenance conducted yesterday. We appreciate the time and effort that you invested in the meeting to help us reach an agreement.

We have carefully reviewed your proposed budget of 18,000,000 for the generator maintenance and while we would have liked to work within your budget, we regret to inform you that it is not feasible for us to match this budget. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause you.

We would like to assure you that we take pride in providing high-quality services to our clients. In order to do so, we make use of high-quality spares, carry out meticulous maintenance and have associated costs as well as high raw materials cost, which are causing higher cost of spares. As such, matching your proposed budget would not allow us to deliver the high level of service that we pride ourselves on.

In light of the above, while we would have liked to accept your offer, we are unable to do so. We hope you understand that in order to deliver high-quality maintenance services, we need to maintain our pricing to ensure that we can provide top-notch services, excellent materials and workmanship.

However, we would like to offer you a 5% discount from our initial quoted offer. We hope that this will enable us to come to an agreement so that we can provide you with the best services that you deserve.

We understand that this is not the outcome you were hoping for, and we understand if you will need to seek other options. We are open to discuss other possibilities that might fit your budget and requirements, and would be happy to engage further on how we may be able to support you in maintaining your equipment.

Thank you for your time and consideration, and we look forward to the opportunity to work with you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

[Company Name]

turns.text: All filters availble in stock except 02pcs of air cleaner, total 08pcs of air cleaners were requested and we have 06pcs in stock. We are working in arranging remaining 02pcs. Will update you soon about the filters delivery. write a professiona email

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Subject: Availability of filters for your order

Dear [Client’s Name],

We hope this email finds you well. We wanted to provide you with an update on the availability of the air cleaners that you requested as part of your order.

We are pleased to inform you that all the filters that you have ordered are currently available in our stock, except for 2 pieces of air cleaners. We understand that a total of 8 air cleaners were requested, and we currently have 6 pieces in stock as of now. 

We would like to assure you that we are working diligently to source the remaining 2 pieces of air cleaners to complete your order. We are in touch with our suppliers to arrange for the earliest possible delivery for you, and we will update you as soon as we have more information.

We take pride in providing our clients with high-quality products and services, and we apologize for any inconvenience caused due to the temporary unavailability of the air cleaners. We will do everything possible to ensure that the rest of your order is delivered to you on time as per the agreed-upon terms.

If you have any queries or concerns regarding this matter or your order, please feel free to reach out to us, and we will be more than happy to assist you.

Thank you very much for your understanding and cooperation.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

[Company Name]
